# pico-kafka

> Kafka producers and consumers for the Pico ecosystem over aiokafka

## Docs

- [Home](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/)
- [Getting Started](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/getting-started/)
- [Architecture](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/architecture/)
- [index](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/reference/)
- [API](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/reference/api/)
- [AI Coding Skills](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/skills/)
- [FAQ](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/faq/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/troubleshooting/)
- [Changelog](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/CHANGELOG/)

## For agents

- [Full docs in one file](https://dperezcabrera.github.io/pico-kafka/llms-full.txt)
- [AGENTS.md (conventions and boundaries)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dperezcabrera/pico-kafka/main/AGENTS.md)
